title: Nvidia smashes earnings, Arm walks the plank, M&A market, Vivek dominates GOP debate & more
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros: Friedberg's interview with NASA Astronaut Woody Hoburg, live from the ISS!

(2:58) All-In Tequila update

(10:04) Nvidia smashes earnings, GPU market outlook

(37:39) Arm files for IPO: positive sign or plank walk? Plus: State of the IPO market

(49:51) Sacks on current investable metrics right now in VC

(55:33) GOP Debate breakdown: Vivek's statement, DeSantis's strategy, Haley & Christie solidify positions

(1:39:46) Vivek's comments on the Climate Agenda

(1:47:07) Prigozhin crash

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Nvidia's impressive earnings, Arm's IPO filing, and the current state of the M&A market. They also break down the recent GOP debate, with a focus on Vivek Ramaswamy's performance. Additionally, they touch on various other topics, including the climate agenda and the Prigozhin crash.

sentiment.notes: The podcast covers a range of topics, with both positive and negative discussions. The hosts seem optimistic about Nvidia's earnings and Vivek Ramaswamy's performance, but also express caution about the current state of the M&A market and the climate agenda.

notable_moments.description: Friedberg's interview with NASA Astronaut Woody Hoburg
Vivek Ramaswamy's statement at the GOP debate
